purpose: Resolve direct closing pull requests and compute changed-file, test-touch, and obvious multi-issue signals before exact Git materialization or task-semantic review.
terminal_status_note: Every route is a priority decision only. Missing tests, multiple closing pull requests, broad diffs, and multi-issue body references do not exclude a candidate or change an inclusion-rule value.

method.issue_solution_resolution: Read the public issue HTML embedded closedByPullRequestsReferences. A generic linked PR is weaker and is not substituted when a closing reference exists.
method.pull_request_metadata: Read public PR HTML for merged state, title, branch names, full head revision, commit count, and a hash of the PR body.
method.diff_metadata: Read the public .diff artifact; record its SHA-256, changed paths, count, and conventional test-path matches.
method.test_path_pattern: A test/tests/spec/__tests__ directory segment, or a non-document filename containing _test, test_, .test., or .spec.
method.obvious_multi_issue_signal: More than one closing reference in the PR body, more than one priority candidate mapped to the same PR, or a PR commit set that contains another priority PR's commit set. A smaller self-contained prefix PR is not penalized merely because a later PR stacked on it.
method.advance_rule: Exactly one merged closing PR, at least one conventional test path, and no obvious multi-issue signal.
method.frozen_order_within_route: Ascending candidate ledger_index. Changed-file count is recorded but no post-hoc threshold is introduced.

review_provenance.bounded_anomaly_review: Claude CLI read-only review of three multiple-closing candidates and nine eligible-queue multi-issue PRs, followed by Codex source-rule cross-check; Codex separately checked suspected-ineligible and commit-overlap additions.
corrections_applied: Removed docs/specs directory false positives and excluded documentation-only filename matches such as test_cases.md from test-touch.
Parsed all 107 complete PR commit lists and routed only stacked supersets or partial/equal overlaps to scope review; a smaller self-contained prefix PR stays eligible for its own issue.

next_boundary: Resolve the exact pre-solution base/tree and pinned license for the 28 eligible advance rows and the four suspected-ineligible confirmation rows. Keep the 15 scope-review and 59 no-test-touch eligible rows nonterminal and deferred.
known_limitations: The test-touch predictor was derived from a small known-outcome set and its precision is not an eligibility criterion.
PR head revision is not the candidate base revision. Rank 5 must reconstruct merge ancestry or issue-specific commit lineage before using a base.
A PR body may over- or under-state its issue scope; the signal only prevents premature deep review.
Changed paths are capped at 50 in the tracked listing for large diffs, while the full diff SHA-256 and total count remain recorded.
